mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_NAME_TRNS ( TRNS_SEQ, TRNS_NM, TRNS_MOBILE_NO, TRNS_PHONE_NO, TRNS_PWD, TRNS_MYSLF_CONF_METH_CD, TRNS_STTUS_CD, TRNS_TRNSFE_NM, TRNS_TRNSFE_MOBILE_NO, TRNS_CSTMR_TYPE_CD, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, CRET_ID, CRET_DT ) VALUES ( #{trnsApyNo}, #{trnsNm}, #{trnsMobileNo}, #{trnsPhoneNo}, #{trnsPass}, #{trnsMyslfConfMeth}, #{trnsStatusVal}, #{trnsTrnsfeNm}, #{trnsTrnsfeMobileNo}, 'P', 'N', 'N', #{cretId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_NAME_CHG ( CRET_ID, CRET_DT, MANAGER_CD, AGENT_CD, OPER_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, FATH_TRG_YN, SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, REQ_INFO_CHG_YN, USIM_SUCC_YN, REC_YN, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN, CSTMR_NM, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_YN, CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_YN, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_YN, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_YN, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_YN, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_YN, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_YN, CLAUSE_JEHU_YN, CLAUSE_FINANCE_YN, PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE_YN, OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE_YN, OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE_YN, OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE_YN, CLAUSE_FATH_YN ) VALUES ( #{cretId}, NOW(), 'MFORM', 'MFORM', 'NC', 'P', '1', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', #{trnsfeNm}, #{trnsfeResno}, 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N', 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE MSF_REQUEST_NAME_TRNS SET TRNS_STTUS_CD = #{trnsStatusVal}, AMD_DT = NOW() WHERE NFL_CHG_TRNS_SEQ = #{trnsApyNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSF_CUST_REQUEST_MST ( REQUEST_KEY, REQ_TYPE_CD, USER_ID, CSTMR_NM, MOBILE_NO, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CONTRACT_NUM, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE_CD, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ETC_MOBILE_NO, CRET_ID, CRET_DT ) VALUES ( #{custReqSeq}, #{reqType}, #{userid}, #{grCstmrName}, #{mobileNo}, #{grCstmrNativeRrn}, #{contractNum}, #{grCstmrType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grOnlineAuthType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grOnlineAuthInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{etcMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userid}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_NAME_CHG ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_ID, CRET_DT, MANAGER_CD, AGENT_CD, OPER_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, MCN_RES_NO, IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, FATH_TRG_YN, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE_CD, AUTH_INFO, SELF_CERT_TYPE_CD, SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DATE, SELF_ISSU_NO, REQ_INFO_CHG_YN, CSTMR_NM, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, AGNT_TEL_NO, MINOR_AGENT_NM, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_REL_TYPE_CD, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, CSTMR_ZIPCD, CSTMR_ADR, CSTMR_ADR_DTL, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN_NO, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN_NO, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN_NO, CSTMR_EMAIL_ADR, SOC, SOC_NM, JEHU_PROD_TYPE_CD, USIM_SUCC_YN, ICC_ID, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_TYPE_CD, REQ_PAY_TYPE_CD, REQ_BANK_CD, REQ_ACCOUNT_NO, REQ_CARD_COMPANY_CD, REQ_CARD_NO, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_PAY_OTHER_YN, CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_YN, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_YN, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_YN, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_YN, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_YN, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_YN, CLAUSE_JEHU_YN, CLAUSE_FINANCE_YN, PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE_YN, OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE_YN, OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE_YN, OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE_YN, CLAUSE_FATH_YN, MCN_STAT_RSN_CD, PROC_CD, MCN_STATE_CD, REC_YN, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN ) VALUES ( #{custReqSeq}, #{userid}, NOW(), 'MFORM', #{agencyCode}, 'NC', #{cstmrType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mcnResNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{selfCertType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1'), 'N', #{onlineAuthType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{onlineAuthInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selfCertType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{selfInqryAgrmYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), #{selfIssuExprDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selfIssuNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{reqInfoChgYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), #{cstmrName}, #{cstmrNativeRrn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmrForeignerNation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntTelNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{minorAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{minorAgentRrn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{minorAgentRelation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{minorAgentAgrmYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), 'N', #{cstmrPost, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmrAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmrAddrDtl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmrReceiveTelFn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmrReceiveTelMn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmrReceiveTelRn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmrMail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{socNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jehuProdType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{usimSuccYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), #{iccId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmrBillSendCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqPayType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqBank, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqAccountNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqCardCompany, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqCardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqCardYy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqCardMm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N', COALESCE(#{clauseCntrDelFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{clausePriCollectFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{clausePriOfferFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{clauseEssCollectFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{clauseConfidenceFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{clausePriAdFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{clauseJehuFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), 'N', COALESCE(#{personalInfoCollectAgree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{othersTrnsAgree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{othersTrnsKtAgree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{othersAdReceiveAgree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), 'N', #{mcnStatRsnCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procCd}, '00', 'N', 'N', 'N' )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_NAME_TRNS ( TRNS_SEQ, TRNS_CSTMR_TYPE_CD, TRNS_NM, TRNS_MOBILE_NO, TRNS_PHONE_NO, TRNS_PWD, TRNS_MYSLF_CONF_METH_CD, TRNS_TRNSFE_NM, TRNS_TRNSFE_MOBILE_NO, TRNS_STTUS_CD, MINOR_AGENT_NM, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_REL_TYPE_CD, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, CRET_ID, CRET_DT ) VALUES ( #{custReqSeq}, #{grCstmrType}, #{grCstmrName}, #{mobileNo}, #{mobileNo}, '-', '1', #{cstmrName}, COALESCE(#{cstmrReceiveTelFn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') || COALESCE(#{cstmrReceiveTelMn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') || COALESCE(#{cstmrReceiveTelRn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ''), '2', #{grMinorAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grMinorAgentRrn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grMinorAgentRelation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{grMinorAgentAgrmYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), 'N', #{userid}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE MSF_CUST_REQUEST_MST SET ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE_CD = '', ONLINE_AUTH_INFO = '' WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{custReqSeq}

UPDATE MSF_REQUEST_NAME_CHG SET ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE_CD = '', AUTH_INFO = '', SELF_CERT_TYPE_CD = '', SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DATE = '', SELF_ISSU_NO = '', SELF_CSTMR_CI_INFO = '' WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{custReqSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT A.SVC_CNTR_NO, A.TEL_NO, A.SVC_STATUS, A.CUST_ID, A.ACT_DATE, A.SOC, B.SALE_SBSD_NM AS SOC_NM FROM MSP_CNTR_INFO@DL_MSP A LEFT JOIN MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST@DL_MSP B ON A.SOC = B.SALE_SBSD_CD WHERE A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{contractNum}
